title: calcitrapa maroccana
intro: Calcitrapa maroccana, also known as Moroccan prickly lettuce, is a plant species belonging to the Nasturtium family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calcitrapa maroccana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
